style_note: Tile Africa's current name for the coastal-look collection - this fills the UI placeholder 'Coastal'. The 'Coastal Hue' name in earlier planning no longer exists on their site (URL 404s); Mediterranean Hues is its replacement in their live style taxonomy. Look: whites, soft naturals, Mediterranean blue accents, chrome tapware.
known_gaps: Tile Africa's Mediterranean Hues bathroom sub-listing is tapware-only (7 Evox Kelia/Caspian mixers). Everything else here was style-matched from their wider catalogue on 2026-07-10 (coastal whites/naturals/blue accents, chrome fittings) - same approach as Modern Metro's wall tiles. Prices are real and current; the style pairing is our curation, not Tile Africa's tagging.
Built-in baths come from the general built-in baths category - Tile Africa does not tag any built-in bath to a style collection.
Floor tile premium (Oaklore Bianco wood-look) comes from the Mediterranean Hues collection page rather than the bathroom sub-listing.
Only two bath mixers in the style's own range - the Caspian handshower kit is used for both mid and premium.
Wall tile mid and premium are the same price (Cambry gloss colour variants at R350/m2).

Storage: not tagged to style collections by Tile Africa - storage_compact/storage_full sourced from the wider catalogue on 2026-07-10, matched by finish (white/ivory for Mediterranean Hues' coastal-whites look). Two size bands per tier - storage_compact for bathrooms under 6m2 floor area, storage_full at 6m2 and above. The compact-budget option (Croydex corner basket) is a neutral catch-all used across all 6 styles at this tier.
